comment: Build-correctness and rendered-workflow gate: zero-dependency unit tests over the DOM-free episode/preset/export model, a preview-build smoke check, a headless Chrome rendered workflow that uploads two generated local WebM files through the shipped Host and Guest controls and decodes blob-backed pixels in the composed preview surviving a preset switch, a headless social-context workflow that enters distinct per-speaker social links through the real inputs and confirms they store per speaker, surface as derived names in the preview, and survive a preset switch with the uploads intact, and a headless export workflow that uploads two real WebM through the shipped inputs, enters social links, selects a preset, clicks the Export action, and proves the produced Blob is a real playable episode video (non-trivial size, WebM/EBML magic, decodable video track) captured from the live run. No seeded product media, committed fixture output, or verifier-only product paths are used.
